name: Majma' ibn Ziyad
title: Uqba's Fellow Traveler
shortDescription: Another warrior from the Juhaynah tribe who joined the Imam on the way to Kufa and was martyred on the front line defending the Ahl al-Bayt.
fullStory:
Majma' ibn Ziyad al-Juhani was a pious and brave man from the Juhaynah tribe. Like his tribesman, Uqba ibn al-Salt, he accompanied Imam Hussain (AS) when the Imam's caravan passed through their residential areas.

Majma' was among the freemen who abandoned the world and its glitter for the sake of helping the Prophet's (PBUH) son. When Imam Hussain (AS) lifted his allegiance from his companions on the night of Ashura, Majma' also remained by the Imam like a solid mountain.

On the morning of Ashura, with the firing of the first arrow by Umar Sa'd and the start of the enemy's coordinated attack, Majma' ibn Ziyad also drew his sword. Shoulder to shoulder with Uqba and the other companions, he bravely fought the covenant-breaking Kufans.

After much resistance against the flood of enemies, he joined the great multitude of Karbala martyrs in that very first attack, struck by arrows and swords.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى مَجْمَعِ بْنِ زِيادٍ الجُهَنِيِّ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Majma' ibn Ziyad al-Juhani.
